caption: The video features a graphic layout divided vertically between a textured, dark yellow and grey background on the left and a light grey background on the right. On the left side, the logo "TFNN.COM" appears above the text "EDUCATING INVESTORS," with a blue and white Discord icon positioned underneath. The right side of the screen displays a list of features. In the initial frames, the text reads "INTERACT WITH OTHER TIGERS AND TIGRESSES" next to a small yellow arrow. As the sequence progresses, additional lines of text appear sequentially beneath the first. The text "NEWS ANALYSIS" appears next to a yellow arrow, followed by a final line that reads "DISCUSS THE MARKET ACTION," also preceded by a yellow arrow. The layout remains static while the textual list grows longer over time.
